title: Smoky Middle Eastern Chinese Cabbage Falafel
description: A briny, crispy, and indulgent Middle Eastern dish featuring Chinese cabbage and smoked flavors, formed into high-protein falafel and cooked in a tandoor clay pot.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor clay pot to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a food processor, combine chickpeas, Chinese cabbage, smoked paprika, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and falafel spice mix.
Process the mixture until it is well combined and slightly chunky.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small falafel patties.
Place the falafel patties in the preheated tandoor clay pot and cook for 20 minutes, flipping halfway through.
Remove the falafel from the pot and let them cool on a wire rack.
Serve the smoky Middle Eastern Chinese cabbage falafel hot with your favorite toppings or sauces.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
